title: San Diego Surf
actors: Joe Dallesandro, Eric Emerson, Tom Hompertz
plot: Viva and Taylor Mead are a married couple renting an extra beach-house to a group of surfers sent to them by a Mr. Morrissey of La Jolla Realty. Their daughter, Ingrid Superstar, is pregnant and on the hunt for a husband. Mr. Mead...
